comments.body:
Skipping CI for Draft Pull Request.
If you want CI signal for your change, please convert it to an actual PR.
You can still manually trigger a test run with `/test all`

Could you add some tests and a couple of examples in the man page.
Maybe an example in `podman pod inspect --help`
Also need changes to command completions.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *boaz0*, *rhatdan* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Flibpod). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/libpod/blob/master/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
One underline nit, LGTM once fixed.

/lgtm
/hold

Looks like one test flaked, we can merge once it's green

cirrus-flake-summarize blames the json-output flake which should soon be fixed by #6406 

#### test fedora-31 fedora-31
